parsed.production_notes: The top panel features an AI-generated humanoid robot with static facial features and slightly unnatural movements. The bottom panel is standard human-recorded video.

characters.appearance: Humanoid robot with a metallic silver body, white face, red bindi, and red lips. Has a static, doll-like expression.
characters.wardrobe: Teal and gold silk saree, gold bangles.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, brown complexion, messy black hair, slight beard.
characters.demeanor: Sleepy initially, then surprised and enthusiastic.

scenes.setting: Top: Bedroom with a bed, pillows, calendar on wall. Bottom: Bedroom with a bed, window in background.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A, a humanoid robot woman, is lying on a bed. She has a silver metallic body and a white face with a red bindi. She is dressed in a teal and gold silk saree and wears gold bangles on her wrists. Her head rests on several patterned pillows. A wall calendar hangs in the background. She makes small gestures with her right hand while looking forward.

Character B, a young man, is lying in bed. He has messy black hair, a slight beard, and a brown complexion. He is wearing a simple grey t-shirt. He looks upwards, directing his attention towards the top panel. A window letting in natural light is visible in the background behind him. His expression is initially sleepy and slightly confused.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout features a robot woman on the top panel and a human man on the bottom panel. Text overlays appear in the center of the screen, highlighting the spoken dialogue. Graphic icons like a red cross and a green checkmark appear alongside the text to indicate incorrect and correct grammar. The man looks sleepy and confused as the robot corrects his English. The overall tone is conversational and instructional.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: என்ன பண்ற [What are you doing?]
Character B says: I... sleeping. [I... sleeping.]
Character A says: I am sleeping-னு சொல்லணும். [You should say 'I am sleeping'.]
Character A says: இன்னும் கொஞ்சம் ஃபார்மலா I am getting some sleep-னும் சொல்லலாம். [More formally, you can also say 'I am getting some sleep'.]
Character B says: ஓ... அப்படியா? எப்படி இங்கிலீஷ் கத்துக்கிறது? [Oh... is that so? How to learn English?]
scenes.on_screen_text: என்ன பண்ற (What are you doing), I...sleeping, I am sleeping, இன்னும் கொஞ்சம் (A little more), I am getting some sleep, அப்படியா (Is that so), எப்படி இங்கிலீஷ் (How to English)

scenes.setting: Top: Bedroom with a bed, pillows, calendar on wall. Bottom: Bedroom with a bed, window in background.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A remains lying on the bed in the same position. Her silver metallic arms and teal silk saree are clearly visible against the patterned pillows. She continues to look forward with a static, calm expression. She makes subtle movements with her right hand as if explaining something. The background with the wall calendar remains unchanged.

Character B is still lying in bed, resting his head on the pillow. He continues to wear his grey t-shirt. He looks upwards towards the top panel with an attentive expression. The natural light from the window behind him illuminates the room. He appears to be listening closely to the instructions.

scenes.visual_description: The split-screen layout continues with the same characters in their respective panels. Large graphic overlays of a clock and a calendar appear over the video as the robot speaks about the time commitment required. Text overlays continue to pop up in the center. The man listens attentively and then asks a question about the cost. The scene emphasizes the ease and speed of the learning process.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: என் கூட தினமும் ஒரு 15 நிமிஷம் பிராக்டிஸ் பண்ணா போதும். [Practicing with me for just 15 minutes daily is enough.]
Character A says: ஒரே மாசத்துல இங்கிலீஷ் கத்துக்கலாம். [You can learn English in just one month.]
Character B says: இதெல்லாம் ரொம்ப செலவாகுமே? [Won't all this be very expensive?]
scenes.on_screen_text: தினமும் ஒரு 15 (Daily a 15), நிமிஷம் பிராக்டிஸ் (Minute practice), பண்ணா போதும் (Is enough to do), ஒரே மாசத்துல (In just one month), இங்கிலீஷ் கத்துக்கலாம் (Can learn English), இதெல்லாம் ரொம்ப (All this is very), செலவு ஆகுமே வெறும் (Will be expensive just)

scenes.setting: Top: Bedroom with a bed, pillows, calendar on wall. Bottom: Bedroom with a bed, window in background.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A maintains her position on the bed, propped up against the pillows. Her teal and gold saree drapes over her metallic body. She continues to look forward with her static, doll-like face. Her right hand rests near her waist, occasionally moving slightly. The bedroom setting behind her remains consistent.

Character B is lying in bed, but his expression shifts significantly. He looks upwards with a look of surprise. He then turns his gaze directly towards the camera. A broad, enthusiastic smile spreads across his face. The background window and lighting remain the same.

scenes.visual_description: The split-screen format persists without any camera changes. Graphic overlays showing a pricing offer and a user milestone badge appear prominently over the footage. Text overlays continue to accompany the dialogue. The man's reaction changes from attentive to highly surprised and enthusiastic. He smiles broadly at the camera, reacting to the affordability and popularity of the app.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: வெறும் ஒரு ரூபாய்க்கு இந்த ஆப் முழுசா ட்ரை பண்ணி பார்க்கலாம். [You can try this entire app for just one rupee.]
Character A says: ஒரு கோடிக்கும் மேல பேர் என் கூட இங்கிலீஷ் கத்துக்குறாங்க. [Over one crore people are learning English with me.]
Character B says: சூப்பர்! எப்படி ஜாயின் பண்றது? [Super! How to join?]
scenes.on_screen_text: 1 ரூபாய்க்கு (For 1 rupee), இந்த ஆப் முழுசா (This app fully), ட்ரை பண்ணி பார்க்கலாம் (Can try and see), ஒரு கோடி மேல பேர் (Over one crore people), என் கூட இங்கிலீஷ் (English with me), சூப்பர் (Super), எப்படி ஜாயின் (How to join), பண்றது (Do)

scenes.setting: Top: Bedroom with a bed, pillows, calendar on wall. Bottom: Bedroom with a bed, window in background.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is still positioned on the bed, resting against the pillows. She wears the same teal and gold silk saree and gold bangles. She looks forward, maintaining her calm demeanor. She raises her right hand slightly in a gesturing motion. The wall calendar and bedroom background are unchanged.

Character B remains in bed, looking directly at the camera. He maintains a bright, enthusiastic smile. His messy black hair and grey t-shirt are visible. The natural light from the window continues to light the scene. He appears happy and engaged.

scenes.visual_description: The final segment maintains the split-screen layout. An app installation graphic overlay, resembling a mobile app store interface, appears briefly over the video. Text overlays deliver the final call to action. The robot woman gives the concluding instruction while the man continues to smile at the camera. The video ends on a positive, encouraging note.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: இப்போ உடனே MySivi ஆப் டவுன்லோட் பண்ணி இங்கிலீஷ் கத்துக்க ஆரம்பிங்க. [Download the MySivi app right now and start learning English.]
scenes.on_screen_text: இப்போ உடனே MySivi (Right now MySivi), ஆப் டவுன்லோட் (App download), பண்ணி (Having done), இங்கிலீஷ் கத்துக்க (To learn English), ஆரம்பிங்க (Start)
